subject: [PATCH v7 03/15] mm: rename uffd-wp PTE accessors to uffd

2026-06-29.patch_summary: This patch renames various kernel-internal names related to the uffd-wp PTE bit, which is reused for marking access-tracking PTEs alongside write-protected ones. The renaming affects several files across the Linux kernel, including header files and source code. The changes are purely mechanical and do not introduce any behavior changes. The patch aims to simplify the handling of this bit by making its meaning dependent on the VMA flag (WP or RWP) rather than its name.
